---
name: Documentation Update
about: Improve or fix project documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

## Summary

Brief description of the documentation change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Spelling/Grammar fix
- [ ] Clarification of existing content
- [ ] Addition of new documentation
- [ ] Removal of outdated documentation
- [ ] Code example update

## Files Affected

List the files that need documentation updates:

- `docs/example.md`
- `README.md`

## Details

Provide specific details about what needs to be changed or added.

## Verification

- [ ] Documentation builds without errors
- [ ] All code examples are tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Cross-references are updated (if applicable)
